channel.title: Pokemon GO News & Events
channel.description: Official Pokemon GO + GO Hub + LeekDuck

item.title: [GO Hub News] Pokémon GO Events This Week: July 6-12, 2026
item.description:
Pokémon GO’s July 6-12 week sees us will into the season of Forever Forward! This is the biggest week of the year in Pokémon GO, with the Road of Legends and global GO Fest taking place! Plus the weekly rotating Raid Hours, Spotlight Hour, Dynamax Battles and Mega Raids. If you play only one week […]

The post Pokémon GO Events This Week: July 6-12, 2026 appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub Events] GO Fest 2026: Road of Legends
item.description:
The countdown to Pokémon GO Fest 2026: Global begins with Road of Legends, a stacked week of Legendary raids, Mega Raids, event bonuses, Special Backgrounds, Adventure Effects, and a new GO Pass. Running from July 6, 2026, at 12:01 a.m. to July 10, 2026, at 11:59 p.m. local time, Road of Legends is a final […]

The post GO Fest 2026: Road of Legends appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub News] Road of Legends Day 1: All Five-Star Raids, Rayquaza, Mega Salamence, Bonuses and Guides
item.description:
Road of Legends is a stacked week of Legendary raids, Mega Raids, event bonuses, Special Backgrounds, Adventure Effects, and a new GO Pass. Running from July 6, 2026, at 12:01 a.m. to July 10, 2026, at 11:59 p.m. local time, Road of Legends is a final prep event before GO Fest Global weekend. Trainers will […]

The post Road of Legends Day 1: All Five-Star Raids, Rayquaza, Mega Salamence, Bonuses and Guides appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub News] Niantic Games Team Now Officially Called Scopely Explore
item.description:
Today, 6th July 2026, the Niantic games team officially updates its name to Scopely Explore. As part of the rebrand they intend to debut a new look. They have shared that the Pokémon GO team remains the same, as does their commitment to creating the best gameplay experiences for Trainers everywhere. It has been more […]

The post Niantic Games Team Now Officially Called Scopely Explore appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [Official] ¡El nuevo calendario de eventos lleva vuestras aventuras de Pokémon GO a otro nivel!
item.description: Artículo oficial de Pokémon GO: ¡El nuevo calendario de eventos lleva vuestras aventuras de Pokémon GO a otro nivel!

item.title: [Official] ¡Ho-Oh, Gimmighoul con una moneda del 10.º aniversario y más os esperan en el Pase de GO de julio!
